subject: Geography
overall_learning_objectives: Analyse the formation and occurrence of minerals in different geological structures
Evaluate the role of mineral resources in industrial and economic development
Interpret maps showing distribution of minerals and energy resources in India
Compare conventional and non-conventional sources of energy
Assess the environmental impacts of mining activities
Investigate renewable energy potential in India
Develop critical thinking about sustainable resource management

lesson_plan.title: Minerals and Their Role in Development
topics_covered: Minerals as the foundation of industrial development
Importance of minerals in modern society
student_activities: Analyse everyday objects and identify the minerals used in them
Explain how minerals influence industrial growth

lesson_plan.title: Geological Formation and Occurrence of Minerals
topics_covered: Minerals in igneous and metamorphic rocks
student_activities: Draw diagrams showing different mineral formations
Explain how geological conditions influence mineral deposits

lesson_plan.title: Classification of Minerals
student_activities: Create a comparative chart of mineral types
Analyse industrial uses and economic importance

lesson_plan.title: Distribution of Minerals in India
topics_covered: Mineral-rich regions such as the Chota Nagpur plateau
teaching_strategy: Guided analysis of mineral distribution maps
student_activities: Mark mineral belts on an outline map of India
Explain reasons for uneven mineral distribution

lesson_plan.title: Energy Resources and Industrial Development
teaching_strategy: Discussion on energy use in industries
student_activities: Analyse why industries are located near coalfields
Interpret maps showing energy resource distribution

lesson_plan.title: Renewable Energy and Sustainable Development
student_activities: Research renewable energy projects in India
Present advantages and limitations of renewable energy

lesson_plan.title: Conservation and Environmental Challenges
teaching_strategy: Debate on mining vs environmental protection
student_activities: Write a short essay on sustainable resource use
Participate in a classroom debate on resource conservation

teacher_tip: Encourage students to critically analyse how mineral and energy resources influence economic development and environmental sustainability.
